name: Sheoldred, the Apocalypse
oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 2 life.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player loses 2 life.
design_notes: A powerhouse legendary creature showing several patterns: (1) Legendary Creature type line with race and class subtypes (Phyrexian Praetor), (2) keyword ability on its own line before triggered abilities, (3) symmetry-breaking design — rewards your draws, punishes opponent's draws, (4) 4/5 deathtouch for 4 mana is already solid stats, but the triggered abilities push it into mythic territory. Demonstrates how mythics combine efficient bodies with game-warping effects.
